body: PolicyEngine-UK 2.88.56 parameter snapshot for temporary energy-support parameters. For 2026-01-01, PolicyEngine-UK parameter gov.treasury.energy_bills_rebate.energy_bills_credit is 0. For 2026-01-01, PolicyEngine-UK parameter gov.treasury.energy_bills_rebate.council_tax_rebate.amount is 0. For 2026-01-01, PolicyEngine-UK parameter gov.ofgem.energy_price_cap is 1,641 and parameter gov.ofgem.energy_price_guarantee is 3,000, so PolicyEngine UK's Energy Price Guarantee subsidy floors to 0 when the price guarantee is not below the price cap. This snapshot is generated from the installed policyengine-uk==2.88.56 package to ground PE-parity encodings where the validator needs normalized numeric source text.
heading: Temporary energy-support parameters in PolicyEngine-UK 2.88.56
